description_long: This nightstand features a compact, rectangular tabletop supported by four slender, yellow legs. The tabletop is equipped with a prominent, boxy gray structure on one side, which appears to function as a storage compartment or possibly a small safe, with visible vertical ridges and red-tipped details. Atop the nightstand is a flat, white panel, possibly a display or a shallow tray, centrally positioned for easy access. The overall design is utilitarian, with a mix of industrial and modern elements, and the materials suggest a combination of metal and plastic. The legs are thin and slightly uneven, giving the piece a lightweight and portable appearance. There are no visible decorative carvings or embellishments, emphasizing function over form.
description: A compact nightstand with a yellow frame, gray boxy compartment, and a white panel on top, featuring slender legs and an industrial look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white panel centered on the tabletop, with the gray compartment on the right and all four yellow legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the gray compartment and the thinness of the yellow legs, with the compartment's ridges and red details more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the white panel and the gray compartment now on the left, with the tabletop and legs clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the length of the tabletop and the structure of the gray compartment, with the legs appearing more closely spaced.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or beside a bed
